tool.name: FlavoTyper
tool.description: in silico serotyping of Flavobacterium psychrophilum
tool.command: #import re mkdir -p inputs outdir && #for $genome in $genomes: #set $stem = str($genome.element_identifier) #for $ext in ['.fasta.gz', '.fna.gz', '.fa.gz', '.fas.gz', '.fasta', '.fna', '.fa', '.fas']: #if $stem.lower().endswith($ext): #set $stem = $stem[:-len($ext)] #break #end if #end for #set $safe_name = re.sub('[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]', '_', $stem) ln -s '$genome' 'inputs/${safe_name}.fasta' && #end for flavotyper type --genomes inputs --outdir outdir --threads \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} #if str($species_check) == 'no': --no-species-check #end if #if str($locus_analysis) == 'yes': --locus-analysis #end if #if str($adv.adv_settings) == 'advanced': --min-identity $adv.min_identity --min-coverage $adv.min_coverage #if str($species_check) == 'yes': --ani-threshold $adv.ani_threshold #end if #if str($adv.expected_genome_size_min) != '': --expected-genome-size-min $adv.expected_genome_size_min #end if #if str($adv.expected_genome_size_max) != '': --expected-genome-size-max $adv.expected_genome_size_max #end if #if str($adv.warn_contigs_over) != '': --warn-contigs-over $adv.warn_contigs_over #end if #if str($adv.high_warn_contigs_over) != '': --high-warn-contigs-over $adv.high_warn_contigs_over #end if #if $adv.allow_duplicate_sample_names: --allow-duplicate-sample-names #end if #end if

param.name: genomes
param.label: Genome assembly FASTA(s)
param.help: Please provide one or multiple Flavobacterium psychrophilum genome assemblies. Every selected dataset is typed and the results are combined into a single table. The dataset name is used as the sample identifier.

param.name: species_check
param.label: Run species verification (ANI computation against reference strain NCIMB 1947T) (recommended)?
param.help: **This step is highly recommended.** It computes the average nucleotide identity (fastANI) of each genome against the bundled Flavobacterium psychrophilum NCIMB 1947T reference and requires it to pass before typing. Disable only for non-target or already-verified assemblies.

param.name: locus_analysis
param.label: Run locus analysis?
param.help: For each sample with a Resolved serotype call, run a second BLASTN and produce a pairwise alignment file and a two-track locus map image.

param.name: min_identity
param.label: Minimum BLASTN percent identity
param.help: (--min-identity) Minimum percent identity for a marker hit to be accepted.

param.name: min_coverage
param.label: Minimum marker coverage (%)
param.help: (--min-coverage) Aligned length / marker length * 100 required for a hit.

param.name: ani_threshold
param.label: Minimum fastANI value
param.help: (--ani-threshold) Minimum ANI required to pass species verification. Only applies when species verification is set to Yes.

param.name: expected_genome_size_min
param.label: Expected minimum genome size (bp)
param.help: (--expected-genome-size-min) Leave blank to use the default.

param.name: expected_genome_size_max
param.label: Expected maximum genome size (bp)
param.help: (--expected-genome-size-max) Leave blank to use the default.

param.name: warn_contigs_over
param.label: Contig-count warning threshold
param.help: (--warn-contigs-over) Leave blank to use the default.

param.name: high_warn_contigs_over
param.label: High contig-count warning threshold
param.help: (--high-warn-contigs-over) Leave blank to use the default.

param.name: allow_duplicate_sample_names
param.label: Allow duplicate sample names
param.help: (--allow-duplicate-sample-names) Permit duplicate sample IDs derived from input dataset names.

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool identifies the serotype of assembled *Flavobacterium psychrophilum* genome samples based on the detection, with BLASTN, of a set of specific biomarker genes. Unique to the tool, a species verification module computes the average nucleotide identity (fastANI) of each genome against the reference strain NCIMB 1947T, so that non-target or misidentified assemblies are flagged before a serotype is assigned. A built-in quality-control module additionally reports genome size, contig count and GC content, and an optional locus analysis module produces, for every resolved sample, a reference-versus-sample alignment and a locus map for visual inspection. For more information on the serotyping database and the available parameters, please visit https://forge.inrae.fr/eric.duchaud/flavotyper
**Inputs**
* **Genome assembly FASTA(s)** — one or more assemblies. Each is typed; the dataset name becomes the sample identifier in the results table.
**Outputs**
* **Typing results** — a tab-separated table with one row per sample (serotype, O-/R-/S-type, call state, present markers, QC flags, …). * **Locus analysis results** *(when "Run locus analysis?" = Yes)* — a collection containing, for each resolved sample, a locus map image (PNG), a pairwise alignment (text), and the extracted locus sequence (FASTA).
**Advanced options**
BLASTN hit filtering (identity, coverage), fastANI species verification (toggle and threshold), and assembly QC thresholds (expected genome size, contig-count warnings) are available under *Specify advanced parameters?*. The built-in marker, reference genome, and reference-locus databases shipped with FlavoTyper are always used.
For full documentation see https://forge.inrae.fr/eric.duchaud/flavotyper
